scenarios.description: Create governed lab CSV workflows through the public API path.
notes: Covers parser, validation, retrieval evidence, clinical package build, and persistence.

scenarios.description: Search trusted evidence for a laboratory standards query.
notes: Uses seeded/static retrieval in ASGI smoke mode.

scenarios.description: Open an assistant stream and read the first live event.
notes: CI smoke mode requires the configured assistant provider or expects an explicit unavailable response.

scenarios.description: Parse a small uploaded CSV artifact through durable file parse jobs.
notes: Large OCR/PDF throughput remains a separate worker benchmark.

scenarios.description: Create and execute a local retrieval reindex background job.
notes: Queue-backed worker mode will need its own async worker benchmark later.

scenarios.description: Read runtime readiness diagnostics used by operators and deployment smoke checks.
notes: Readiness must remain bounded even as the runtime surface grows.

warnings: The smoke plan is bounded and repeatable. It is not a replacement for sustained load testing.
HTTP mode requires a running API and a bearer token or authenticated cookie when auth is enabled.
